hero.description: RefBoost is the SaaS platform for partner program management and referral tracking. Automate referral tracking, commissions and your network's performance.
hero.trial_badges: ✓ Free forever · ✓ No credit card · ✓ Setup in 5 min

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything to manage your
features.description: From the first referral to the commission payment, RefBoost automates every step.

items.title: Referral Pipeline
items.desc: Track every referral from first contact to closing. Kanban view, advanced filters, real-time statuses.

items.title: Automatic Commissions
items.desc: Automatic bonus calculation based on your rules. One-click validation, full history, traceable payments.

items.title: Dashboards & KPIs
items.desc: Conversion rate, generated MRR, performance by partner. Make data-driven decisions.

items.title: Your brand, your platform
items.desc: Fully customize the interface: logo, colors, domain. Your partners work in your universe.

items.title: Enterprise-grade security
items.desc: AES-256 encryption, audit logs, anti-brute force protection. GDPR compliant, ISO 27001 ready.

items.title: Unique tracking links
items.desc: Each partner has their personal link. Automatic attribution, public form, zero friction.

steps.title: Create your workspace
steps.desc: Sign up in 2 minutes. Customize your platform with your visual identity.

steps.title: Invite your partners
steps.desc: Send email invitations. Each partner receives their access and tracking link.

steps.title: Track & reward
steps.desc: Your partners submit leads. You track conversion and pay commissions automatically.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: They manage their referral partners with RefBoost

items.t: We tripled our referral partner channel in 4 months. The tool is intuitive and our partners love it.
RefBoost allowed us to structure our referral program. We could never go back.
No more spreadsheets for tracking commissions. Everything is automated, transparent, and our partners are thrilled.

marketplace.description: Hundreds of companies open their program on RefBoost. Join them for free.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple pricing, no surprises
pricing.description: All plans are free to start. No commitment.

items.q: What is a referral partner program?
items.a: It's a system that rewards external partners for every customer they refer to you. RefBoost automates everything: tracking, attribution, commission calculation and payment.
5 minutes. Create your account, invite your first partners, and start receiving referrals today.

items.q: Can I customize the platform to match my brand?
items.a: Yes. Logo, colors, custom domain — your partners work in an environment that reflects your brand, not RefBoost's.
You set the rate per partner or globally. With each won deal, RefBoost automatically calculates the bonus and notifies you for validation.
Absolutely. AES-256 encryption, full audit logs, anti-brute force protection, GDPR compliance. We follow ISO 27001 standards.

cta.title: Ready to structure your
cta.description: Join the companies using RefBoost to turn their referrals into recurring revenue.
cta.note: Free forever · No credit card · Cancel anytime
cta.trial_text: Free forever, no credit card. Set up your program in 5 minutes.
cta.no_commitment: No commitment · Free forever · Support included

footer.tagline: The platform for referral partner program management and professional referrals.

features.label: Feature

pipeline.helmet_desc: Track every referral from first contact to closing. Kanban view, advanced filters, real-time statuses — never miss an opportunity.
pipeline.title: Referral Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: From referral to closing, every lead is tracked, prioritized and actionable in real time.

benefits.statLabel: more leads converted vs unstructured tracking
benefits.title: Real-time Kanban View
benefits.text: See your entire partner pipeline at a glance. Each lead moves through columns as the sale progresses — no spreadsheet, no endless email chains.
points: Configurable columns: New, Qualification, Demo, Proposal, Signed
Drag & drop to change status in one gesture
Automatic notification to the partner at each stage change
Weighted value by closing probability displayed in real time

benefits.statLabel: of teams reduce their response time by more than 2 days
benefits.title: Advanced Filters and Search
benefits.text: Instantly find any lead among hundreds. Filter by partner, amount, status, date or source in one click. No opportunity falls through the cracks.
points: Cumulative filters: partner + status + amount + date
Full-text search on company name, contact, comments
Saved views by sales rep or by source
CSV export of any filtered subset

benefits.statLabel: saved on average per deal thanks to notifications
benefits.title: Complete History and Comments
benefits.text: Each lead has its own record with the history of all actions, sales team comments and exchanges with the partner. Your team's outsourced memory.
points: Full timeline of all status changes
Internal comments visible only to the team
Messages visible to the partner to keep them informed
Reminders and follow-ups schedulable directly on the record

quote.text: We tripled our referral partner channel in 4 months. Pipeline transparency keeps our best partners engaged.
quote.author: Marie D., Sales Director — SaaS B2B

commissions.helmet_desc: Automatic bonus calculation based on your rules. One-click validation, full history, traceable payments. No more spreadsheets.
commissions.title: Automatic Commissions
commissions.subtitle: Set your rules once. RefBoost calculates, validates and tracks every commission without manual intervention.

benefits.statLabel: calculation errors since adopting RefBoost (client data)
benefits.title: Automatic calculation based on your rules
benefits.text: Set your commission grid once — fixed rate, MRR percentage, progressive tiers — and RefBoost automatically calculates the bonus at each validated deal. No more spreadsheet, no more errors.
points: Configurable rates per partner, segment or volume
Progressive tiers: 8% up to 5 deals/month, 12% beyond
Commission on first sale or recurring on subscription
Instant calculation when status updated to "Signed"

benefits.statLabel: of your business rules modelable without development
benefits.title: Flexible and auditable rules
benefits.text: Every commission rule is documented, timestamped and traceable. Your partners see exactly how their compensation is calculated. Transparency builds trust.
points: No-code interface to create and modify rules
Complete history of every rule change
Simulation of expected earnings before deal validation
Different rules by deal type or partner

benefits.statLabel: to export and sync with your accounting software
benefits.title: Export and accounting integrations
benefits.text: Generate your commission statements in one click, export to your accounting software and send details directly to partners. End of month without friction.
points: CSV/PDF export of commissions by period or by partner
Zapier integration for automatic synchronization
Automatic emails to partners with calculation details
Regulatory archiving compliant with GDPR

quote.text: No more spreadsheets for tracking commissions. Everything is automated, transparent, and our partners love receiving their detailed calculations every month.
quote.author: Sophie M., Head of Partnerships — DataViz Pro

analytics.helmet_desc: Conversion rate, generated MRR, performance by partner, average sales cycle — all the metrics that matter in an actionable dashboard.
analytics.title: Analytics & KPIs
analytics.subtitle: Manage your partner program with real data, not gut feelings. Every decision based on facts.

benefits.statLabel: of pipeline generated by 20% of partners on average
benefits.title: Detailed Conversion Funnel
benefits.text: Measure every step between a link click and a signed deal. Pinpoint exactly where you're losing opportunities and correct in real time.
points: Complete funnel: click > form > qualified lead > demo > deal
Conversion rate per stage and per traffic source
Comparison between partners to identify best practices
Automatic alerts if a rate falls below a defined threshold

benefits.statLabel: average ROI observed on the partner channel vs other channels
benefits.title: ROI and cross-channel comparison
benefits.text: For the first time, compare your partner channel to other acquisition channels. Justify your investment with irrefutable numbers.
points: Partner CAC vs SEA, inbound, events
Automatic ROI calculation per euro invested in commissions
12-month projection based on current trends
Report ready to present to the board

benefits.statLabel: to prepare the complete monthly partner report
benefits.title: Exportable and schedulable reports
benefits.text: Generate your monthly reports in a few clicks. Schedule their automatic delivery to executives on the first of each month. Your program runs without administrative friction.
points: Complete PDF reports with charts and tables
Detailed CSV export for advanced analysis
Programmable automatic email delivery
Personalized access for executives and investors

quote.text: For the first time, we could show our board the exact ROI of the partner program. €8 generated for every euro invested in commissions.
quote.author: Thomas C., CEO — ScaleUp Agency

personnalisation.helmet_desc: Logo, colors, custom domain: your partners work in your universe, not RefBoost's. A 100% branded experience.
personnalisation.title: Your brand, your platform
personnalisation.subtitle: Logo, colors, custom domain. Your partners have no reason to know you're using RefBoost.

benefits.statLabel: to fully configure the visual identity of your workspace
benefits.title: Complete visual identity
benefits.text: Upload your logo, choose your colors, name your workspace. In less than 2 minutes, the platform reflects your brand. Your partners will see your brand, not RefBoost.
points: High-resolution logo on all pages and emails
Fully customizable primary, secondary and accent color palette
Configurable workspace name (e.g. "Acme Partners Program")
Real-time preview before confirming changes

benefits.statLabel: of your partners stay on your domain without ever seeing RefBoost
benefits.title: Custom domain included
benefits.text: partners.yourcompany.com instead of yourcompany.refboost.io. A subdomain on your existing domain, configured in 10 minutes with our step-by-step guide.
points: Subdomain of your choice configured in minutes
Automatic HTTPS, SSL certificate included and auto-renewed
Emails sent from your domain (@yourcompany.com)
Compatible with all DNS records

benefits.statLabel: higher completion rate on branded forms vs generic forms
benefits.title: Submission form in your brand colors
benefits.text: The public form filled in by prospects referred by your partners is entirely in your colors. Your brand image is preserved end to end.
points: Form design adapted to your visual guidelines
Personalized shareable URL for your partners
Configurable fields based on your qualification needs
Instant notification to your team at each submission

quote.text: Our partners work in our universe. They never knew it was RefBoost behind it. That's exactly what we were looking for.
quote.author: Pierre L., CRO — SaaS Fintech

tracking.helmet_desc: Each partner has their personal link. Automatic attribution, integrated public form, zero friction for your partners and prospects.
tracking.title: Unique tracking links
tracking.subtitle: One link per partner, perfect attribution. Your partners share, leads arrive qualified and automatically attributed.

benefits.statLabel: lead lost or misattributed thanks to automatic tracking
benefits.title: A unique link per partner and source
benefits.text: Each partner has a unique personal link they can vary by channel (LinkedIn, email, event). You know exactly where each lead came from and who brought it.
points: Automatic link generation when the partner is invited
UTM parameters to distinguish sources (LinkedIn, email, phone)
Downloadable QR code for events and presentations
Short link personalized with the partner's name

benefits.statLabel: of leads attributed without manual intervention
benefits.title: Automatic attribution without ambiguity
benefits.text: When a prospect clicks a partner's link and fills in the form, the lead is automatically attributed to them. No disputes, no ambiguity, even weeks later.
points: Persistent tracking cookie configurable (7 to 180 days)
Attribution even if the prospect returns several days later
Full traceability from source to signed deal
Instant notification to the partner at each conversion

benefits.statLabel: configurable attribution windows to match your sales cycle
benefits.title: Configurable attribution windows
benefits.text: Adapt attribution rules to your sales cycle. A short 2-week cycle or a long 6-month cycle: define the window that reflects your commercial reality.
points: Attribution window from 7 to 180 days based on your sales cycle
First-touch or last-touch rule based on your policy
Transparent and auditable attribution conflict management
Retroactivity possible on leads in progress

quote.text: Before RefBoost, we spent 2 hours a month manually reconciling leads with partners. Now it's automatic and dispute-free.
quote.author: Alexandre R., VP Sales — ScaleB2B

billing.cancel_confirm: Your subscription will be canceled at the end of the current period. Continue?

billing.pricing_subtitle: Start free. Scale when you need to.
billing.payment_failed_banner: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to avoid losing your plan.
billing.cancel_line_after: After that, you'll be moved to the free Starter plan (3 partners max).
billing.cancel_line_partners: Your existing partners won't be removed, but you won't be able to add new ones beyond the limit.
billing.cancel_scheduled_banner: Your {{plan}} subscription has been canceled. It will remain active until {{date}}. After that, you'll be moved to the Starter plan.

pricing.hero_subtitle: Start free. Scale when you need to.
pricing.compare_sub: Every feature across all plans, side by side.
pricing.faq_q1: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faq_a1: Yes — upgrade or downgrade anytime. When upgrading, you only pay the pro-rata difference.
pricing.faq_q2: What happens when I reach my partner limit?
pricing.faq_a2: Your existing partners continue working. You just can't add new ones until you upgrade.
pricing.faq_a3: The Starter plan is free forever. For Pro and Business, you can cancel anytime from your billing page.
pricing.faq_a4: Yes — cancel anytime. Your plan stays active until the end of the billing period.
pricing.final_title: Ready to grow your partner network?
pricing.final_subtitle: Start for free — no credit card required.
